meta.title: Reverance by Otium — Batumi residences
meta.description: A premium residential complex on Batumi's Black Sea coast.

hero.subhead: A premium residential complex on Batumi's coast — measured architecture, considered amenities, and one of Europe's most rewarding investment markets.

about.headline: Not a building. A way of living that prefers presence over performance.
about.p1: Reverance occupies one of Batumi's most considered districts — where the new boulevard meets the residential calm of Kacharava. The architecture is restrained, the materials are honest, and every residence is composed around natural light and the sea.
about.p2: Designed by Otium Development, the complex brings together a thoughtful set of amenities — pools, spa, gym, library, yoga deck — without ever feeling busy. The default state is quiet.

investmentBlock.headline: Batumi is, quietly, one of Europe's strongest yield markets.
investmentBlock.citation: Top 10 European investment destination in 2023 — European Best Destinations

apartments.headline: Five compositions, five ways to live.
apartments.subhead: From compact studios to two-bedroom residences with sea-facing balconies — each typology is composed around light, view, and proportion.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: A compact, well-proportioned studio with a south-facing balcony and an efficient open plan — ideal for short-stay rentals or a quiet pied-à-terre.

oneBedroomA.name: One-bedroom · A
oneBedroomA.description: A measured one-bedroom layout with a clear separation between living and rest, and a balcony oriented toward the boulevard.

oneBedroomB.name: One-bedroom · B
oneBedroomB.description: A slightly larger one-bedroom variant with a wider living room and an additional storage zone — calm, functional, sea-facing.

twoBedroomA.name: Two-bedroom · A
twoBedroomA.description: A two-bedroom residence for a small family or a long-stay guest — two full bathrooms, a private balcony, and quiet circulation.

twoBedroomB.name: Two-bedroom · B
twoBedroomB.description: The most generous typology — a corner two-bedroom with an extended balcony and the most open sea view in the building.

amenities.headline: A complete way of living, on a single site.

location.headline: Five minutes from the new boulevard. Seven from the airport.

contact.headline: Begin the conversation.
contact.subhead: Send us a note. We will reply within one business day.

form.success: Thank you. We will reply within one business day.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.

apartmentsPage.headline: Every residence in the building.
apartmentsPage.subhead: Five typologies. Two-hundred-and-ten possible configurations. Choose by area, view, or price.

apartmentDetail.interestedBody: We will walk you through the floor plan, the view, and the purchase process.

hero.headline: A measured investment in a market still mid-cycle.
hero.subhead: Batumi has the rare combination of low entry prices, strong tourism growth, and one of Europe's most favourable tax frameworks for foreign buyers.

growth.title: A tourism economy compounding fast
growth.body: Visitor numbers have roughly doubled in five years. Short-stay rental demand follows the same curve.

tax.title: One of Europe's lightest tax frameworks
tax.body: No purchase tax for non-residents. Five percent flat tax on rental income. No annual property tax up to a generous threshold.

entry.title: Entry prices still well below the Mediterranean
entry.body: Beachfront residences in Batumi trade at a fraction of comparable Spanish, Italian, or Cypriot stock.

operator.title: Hands-off rental operation
operator.body: Otium offers an in-house rental management programme. Owners receive monthly statements and quarterly payouts.

calculator.headline: Estimate your annual return.
calculator.subhead: A simple estimate using the headline numbers. Speak to us for a residence-specific projection.
calculator.disclaimer: Indicative figures. Actual returns vary with season, typology, and rental strategy.

cta.headline: Ready to look at the numbers in detail?
cta.body: We will prepare a one-page projection for the residence you are considering.

notFound.headline: This page is between sea and silence.
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist. Return to the home page to continue.
